task_completion.description: Open Oracle Analytics Desktop and load the 'Sample Order Lines' dataset into a workbook.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Oracle Analytics Desktop interface is visible with the 'Sample Order Lines' dataset open in the data panel or canvas.

task_completion.description: Calculate the 'Loss Rate' (percentage of unprofitable orders where Profit < 0).
task_completion.visual_evidence: A calculation editor or data panel showing a custom calculation (e.g., named 'Loss Rate') that evaluates 'Profit' < 0.
A bar chart is visible on the main canvas.

task_completion.description: Configure the bar chart to show the 'Loss Rate' by 'Region'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The grammar panel or chart axes explicitly show 'Region' and the custom 'Loss Rate' calculation assigned to the visualization.

task_completion.description: Format the 'Loss Rate' as a percentage.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The properties panel for the 'Loss Rate' metric shows the number format set to 'Percent', or the bar chart axis/data labels display values with a '%' sign.
The save dialog or the top title bar of the Oracle Analytics Desktop window displays 'Regional_Loss_Analysis'.

task_completion.description: Export the workbook as a DVA package to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\Regional_Loss_Analysis.dva.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The export dialog in Oracle Analytics Desktop or a file explorer window showing 'Regional_Loss_Analysis.dva' saved in the 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents' directory.

integrity.description: Agent used the Oracle Analytics Desktop GUI to perform the analysis.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Oracle Analytics Desktop application menus, canvas, and dialogs, rather than using a terminal or script editor to generate files.

integrity.description: Agent genuinely created the calculation rather than hardcoding expected answers.
integrity.visual_evidence: The expression editor shows a logical formula (e.g., using CASE, FILTER, or Profit < 0) rather than static text or hardcoded percentages.

integrity.description: Agent used the application's export feature to create the DVA file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'Export' or 'Save As' dialog of Oracle Analytics Desktop is visible, confirming the DVA file was generated by the software.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected exported file is 'Regional_Loss_Analysis.dva' located at 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\Regional_Loss_Analysis.dva'. The visualization must be a bar chart. The calculation for Loss Rate typically involves keywords like CASE, Profit, <, 0, or FILTER. Note: The actual overall loss rate in the dataset is approximately 47.3%, and the lowest loss rate for any individual city is ~29.2%.
